kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Eastcheap goes with Aldric or someone in the Ironmongers' Guild goes with Aldric (but not both).
Between Edmund and Matilda, one goes with Fletcher and the other with Eastcheap.
The artisan in Millpond's levy is lower than both Cedric and the Tanner.
Fletcher does not go with Edmund if and only if Blacksmith goes with Riverside.
Between Matilda and Southgate, one goes with Carpenter and the other with Tanner.
More members of the North Side are in the Joiners' Guild than members of the South Side.
Cedric's levy is exactly 8 coins more than the Cooper.
Either Bridgegate goes with 13 coins, or Millpond goes with 9 coins — but not both.
Blacksmith goes with exactly two of Wulfric, Southgate, and 11 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Either Foxglen goes with Boone or someone in the Sunfish Family goes with Boone (but not both).
Between Mabel and Royce, one goes with Crappie and the other with Foxglen.
The angler at Mossbank's weight is lower than both Gus and the angler who landed the Pike.
Crappie does not go with Mabel if and only if Bass goes with Pinehollow.
Between Royce and Willowmere, one goes with Bluegill and the other with Pike.
More members of the South Watershed are in the Catfish Family than members of the Highland Basin.
Gus' weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler who landed the Carp.
Either Birchpool goes with 12 lb, or Mossbank goes with 10 lb — but not both.
Bass goes with exactly two of Wade, Willowmere, and 11 lb.

In Angler × Species, Carp must go with Esther — every other Angler is already crossed out for it.
In Angler × Pond, Boone must go with Birchpool — every other Pond is already crossed out for it.
In Angler × Pond, Pinehollow must go with Esther — every other Angler is already crossed out for it.
In Angler × Weight, Boone must go with 12 lb — every other Weight is already crossed out for it.
In Angler × Weight, 10 lb must go with Esther — every other Angler is already crossed out for it.
Esther goes with Carp, so it can't also go with Perch.
